title: Lesson 4 — Common adverbs
summary: Polish adverbs are uninflected: one form covers every gender, number, and case. These ten carry a lot of weight in everyday speech — manner (szybko, dobrze, źle), degree (bardzo, trochę), location (tutaj), togetherness (razem), the willingness/gladness marker (chętnie) you hear constantly in invitations, plus a few time anchors (dzisiaj, jutro, teraz).
